title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 5.
content:
There was a Young Lady whose bonnet,
    Came untied when the birds sate upon it;
    But she said, "I don't care!
    All the birds in the air
    Are welcome to sit on my bonnet!"
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 5."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
